content: We can reframe Transformer attention for agent episodic memory as a dynamic, attention-weighted retrieval-augmented generation layer that adapts to an agent's bounded working memory capacity during active learning. Instead of storing all episodic traces directly in the agent's finite context window, attention scores are used to dynamically rank and inject only the most context-relevant past experiences into the agent's generation stream on demand.
source_topics: Transformer attention mechanism for episodic memory
trigger_topic: Transformer attention mechanism for episodic memory
